sql_array: CREATE TABLE sigmoid_test (id UInt64, value Float64, sigmoid_value Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO sigmoid_test (id, value, sigmoid_value) VALUES (1, -1, sigmoid(-1)), (2, 0, sigmoid(0)), (3, 1, sigmoid(1));
UPDATE sigmoid_test SET sigmoid_value = sigmoid(value) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, value, sigmoid(value) AS computed_sigmoid FROM sigmoid_test WHERE value BETWEEN -3 AND 3;
SELECT id, value, sigmoid(value) AS sigmoid_value FROM sigmoid_test ORDER BY sigmoid_value DESC;
